_comment: AgentCore Memory configuration template. Defines how agent session state is stored and managed. Replace all <PLACEHOLDER> values.

session_ttl._comment: How long a session remains active after the last interaction. Default: 1 hour.

max_sessions._comment: Maximum concurrent sessions per user and globally. Prevents runaway session creation.

branching_config._comment: Set branching_enabled to true to allow conversation branching (e.g., exploring alternative plans). Useful for reviewer agent patterns.

storage_backend._comment: DynamoDB is the default and recommended storage backend. For high-throughput agents, consider enabling on-demand capacity.

context_window_management._comment: When the context window fills, older messages are summarized to preserve key context while staying within token limits.
